# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Commands

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      runs-on:
        description: Runner label (e.g., ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest)
        required: false
        default: ubuntu-latest
        type: string
      shell:
        description: Shell to use for running commands (bash, pwsh)
        required: false
        default: bash
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - pwsh
      working-directory:
        description: Working directory to run the commands from
        required: false
        default: .
        type: string
      checkout:
        description: Checkout repository
        required: false
        default: true
        type: boolean
      fetch-depth:
        description: actions/checkout fetch-depth (0 for full history)
        required: false
        default: 1
        type: number
      setup-node:
        description: Setup Node.js
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
      node-version:
        description: Node.js version (used if setup-node is true)
        required: false
        default: "20"
        type: string
      setup-python:
        description: Setup Python
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
      python-version:
        description: Python version (used if setup-python is true)
        required: false
        default: "3.11"
        type: string
      pre-build-commands:
        description: Commands to run before build (multi-line supported)
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      build-commands:
        description: Commands to run for build (multi-line supported)
        required: true
        default: ""
        type: string
      post-build-commands:
        description: Commands to run after build (multi-line supported)
        required: false
        default: ""
        type: string
      continue-on-error:
        description: Continue even if a command fails
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: custom-build-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}-${{ github.event.inputs.runs-on }}-${{ github.event.inputs.working-directory }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build:
    name: Run custom build commands
    runs-on: ${{ github.event.inputs.runs-on }}
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: ${{ github.event.inputs.shell }}
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working-directory }}
    continue-on-error: ${{ github.event.inputs.continue-on-error }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        if: ${{ github.event.inputs.checkout == 'true' }}
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: ${{ github.event.inputs.fetch-depth }}

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: ${{ github.event.inputs.setup-node == 'true' }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.node-version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: ${{ github.event.inputs.setup-python == 'true' }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.python-version }}

      - name: Pre-build commands
        if: ${{ github.event.inputs.pre-build-commands != '' }}
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.pre-build-commands }}

      - name: Build commands
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.build-commands }}

      - name: Post-build commands
        if: ${{ github.event.inputs.post-build-commands != '' }}
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.post-build-commands }}
